title: Panama at the 2026 World Cup: roster, list, players, group and schedule
original_text: Thomas Christiansen has unveiled the 26 players who will represent Panama at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as Los Canaleros aim to improve on their only previous appearance at Russia 2018. Led by Adalberto “Coco” Carrasquilla, the Central American side faces a difficult challenge in a tightly contested Group L. Panama will share Group L with Ghana, Croatia and England, while dreaming of reaching the knockout stage for the first time in program history. Get closer to the game!
